CVE-2018-9543.title: In trim_device of f2fs_format_utils.c, it is possible that the da ...
CVE-2018-9543.description: In trim_device of f2fs_format_utils.c, it is possible that the data partition is not wiped during a factory reset. This could lead to local information disclosure after factory reset with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation. Product: Android. Versions: Android-7.0 Android-7.1.1 Android-7.1.2 Android-8.0 Android-8.1 Android-9. Android ID: A-112868088.

CVE-2020-6070.title: An exploitable code execution vulnerability exists in the file sy ...
CVE-2020-6070.description: An exploitable code execution vulnerability exists in the file system checking functionality of fsck.f2fs 1.12.0. A specially crafted f2fs file can cause a logic flaw and out-of-bounds heap operations, resulting in code execution. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-6104.title: An exploitable information disclosure vulnerability exists in the ...
CVE-2020-6104.description: An exploitable information disclosure vulnerability exists in the get_dnode_of_data functionality of F2fs-Tools F2fs.Fsck 1.13. A specially crafted f2fs filesystem can cause information disclosure resulting in a information disclosure. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-6105.title: An exploitable code execution vulnerability exists in the multipl ...
CVE-2020-6105.description: An exploitable code execution vulnerability exists in the multiple devices functionality of F2fs-Tools F2fs.Fsck 1.13. A specially crafted f2fs filesystem can cause Information overwrite resulting in a code execution. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-6106.title: An exploitable information disclosure vulnerability exists in the ...
CVE-2020-6106.description: An exploitable information disclosure vulnerability exists in the init_node_manager functionality of F2fs-Tools F2fs.Fsck 1.12 and 1.13. A specially crafted filesystem can be used to disclose information. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-6107.title: An exploitable information disclosure vulnerability exists in the ...
CVE-2020-6107.description: An exploitable information disclosure vulnerability exists in the dev_read functionality of F2fs-Tools F2fs.Fsck 1.13. A specially crafted f2fs filesystem can cause an uninitialized read resulting in an information disclosure. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.

CVE-2020-6108.title: An exploitable code execution vulnerability exists in the fsck_ch ...
CVE-2020-6108.description: An exploitable code execution vulnerability exists in the fsck_chk_orphan_node functionality of F2fs-Tools F2fs.Fsck 1.13. A specially crafted f2fs filesystem can cause a heap buffer overflow resulting in a code execution. An attacker can provide a malicious file to trigger this vulnerability.
